title: The Secret of Room 214
content: Guests staying in Room 214 often commented on a pleasant scent of fresh flowers, even though the room contained no decorations. Hotel employees searched repeatedly but found nothing unusual. During a renovation, workers removed part of the wall and discovered an old ventilation opening connected to the building's indoor garden. Every morning, the air system carried the fragrance of blooming flowers directly into the room. The unusual discovery delighted both staff and guests, transforming an old mystery into one of the hotel's favorite stories.
